title: Clear a basic washer drainage issue
why_it_works: Drainage problems are often caused by a blocked filter or a pinched drain hose.
steps: Pause the cycle and unplug the washer.
Clean the drain filter and remove lint or coins.
Straighten the drain hose and make sure it is not crushed.
Restart with a short drain or spin program.

title: Restore airflow for weak cooling
why_it_works: Poor airflow and incorrect temperature settings are common reasons for uneven cooling.
steps: Set the refrigerator to the recommended mid-range temperature.
Clear blocked air vents inside the fresh food and freezer sections.
Vacuum dust from the condenser area if accessible.
Wait several hours and confirm temperatures stabilize.
